projectDescription: A payroll calculator for security guards in Colombia with shift scheduling and Colombian labor law compliance
keyFeatures: Automatic payroll calculation with Colombian labor law compliance
Multiple shift patterns (2x2x2 rotativo, 4x2 diurno, 4x2 nocturno)
Day/night shift surcharges and overtime calculation
Automatic divisor adjustment (220h/210h) based on labor law changes
Support for holidays, absences, and paid leave
Real-time calculation of health and pension deductions
publicApiSurface: Shift Types: Diurno (Day), Nocturno (Night), Descanso (Rest), Extra/Festivo (Holiday), Permiso (Leave), Ausencia (Absence)
Surcharge Rates: Night surcharge (0.35x), Day overtime (1.25x), Night overtime (1.75x), Holiday rates (1.8x-2.65x)
Calculation Modes: Commercial Month (30 days) or Real Days
